summary: Exceptional audience recording that rivals pro releases, highlighted by a spacey "The Other One" performance.
review: Reviewers rave about the astonishing clarity of this audience capture, often saying it sounds as good as any Walker‑Scotton‑Miller soundboard release. The concert is described as a solid, enjoyable show with most praise focused on the expansive jam in “The Other One.” While no other spectacular moments are noted, the overall listening experience is highly rewarding.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high reviewer scores (5‑5‑4) and strong praise for both sound quality and performance yield a rating in the good‑to‑great range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners claim the audio is unbelievably clear, beating many professional releases; no major flaws or dropouts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewed as a consistently good show with solid pacing; no specific criticisms of flow were mentioned.
